zh-hans.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil于大约1245年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也迪爾-素爾-阿可林。他和Agnès de Traînel至少有1个儿子。他去世在法国巴-諾門迪曼其馬利尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Hans, Erwin, Egon, Franz, Reinhard, Wolfgang, Angelika, Arno, Bernhard.

North German, Dutch, and Flemish: from a shortened form of the personal name Thietilo, an early medieval pet form of Dietrich (German), Diederik (Dutch), or from some other compound name with the same first element.
Germanized form of Sorbian, Polish, and Czech   Tyl  , a name which is (at least in part) of the same German origin as 1 above.

variants.name: Thielges
meanings: German: from a Rhenish pet form of   Thiel   1.

variants.name: Tiell
meanings: Altered form of German Tiel, a variant of Thiel .

variants.name: Tilleman
meanings: Dutch and Flemish: patronymic from the personal name Tiele (see Thiel 1).
Americanized form of German Tillemann, a cognate of 1 above, derived from the personal name Tillo.

variants.name: Thiele
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Horst, Kurt, Reinhold, Wilhelm, Albrecht, Eberhard, Edelgard, Erna, Erwin.
North German and Dutch: variant of   Thiel   1.
Germanized form of Sorbian, Polish, and Czech Tyl and of its Sorbian and Polish variant Tyla, names which are (at least in part) of the same German origin as 1 above.

variants.name: Tilkens
meanings: Flemish: patronymic from a pet form of the personal name Til, Tijl, of ancient Germanic origin (see Thiel 1).

variants.name: Thielmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Nikolaus.
North German: patronymic or elaborated form of   Thiel  .

variants.name: Thielke
meanings: North German: from a pet form of the personal name   Thiel   1.
Germanized form of Sorbian Tylk, Tylka or Tylko: from a pet form of the personal name Tyl , which is at least in part of the same German origin as 1 above.

variants.name: Dietrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Gerhard, Dieter, Hans, Helmut, Juergen, Wolfgang, Fritz, Hans-Peter, Heinz, Jurgen.

German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Theodoric (see Terry ), composed of the elements theud ‘people, race’ + rīc ‘power(ful), rich’. This surname is also found in some other European countries, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Poland. Compare Dedrick , Deitrich , Detrick , and Tetrick .

variants.name: Teel
meanings: Probably an Americanized form of German   Thiel  .
English: variant of   Teale  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Thielen
meanings: North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Thiel  .

nameMeanings.name: Pons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Pedro, Ramon, Guillermo, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Mario, Rafael, Apolonia.  French Adrien, Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Marcelle, Matilde.
Catalan, French (Occitan), and Dutch: from the medieval personal name Pons (see Ponce ).
German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name, such as Bonhard, formed with the element bon ‘request, petition’ (compare Latin bonus).

variants.name: Ponce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Miguel, Pedro, Raul, Roberto.

Spanish and French: from the medieval personal name Ponce, ultimately from Pontius, a Roman surname, perhaps an ethnic name for someone from Pontus (named from Greek pontos ‘ocean’) in Asia Minor, or an Italic cognate of Latin Quintus ‘fifth’ (i.e. ‘fifth-born’). The name was borne by two 3rd-century Christian saints, a Carthaginian deacon and a martyr of Nice, but was not widely popular in the Middle Ages because of the inhibiting influence of the even more famous Pontius Pilate. In some cases though, the surname may have been originally used for someone who had played the part of this character in a religious play.

en.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil was born about 1245, in Thiel-sur-Acolin, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. He had at least 1 son with Agnès de Traînel. He died in Marigny, Manche, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil est né environ 1245, à Thiel-sur-Acolin, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agnès de Traînel. Il est décédé à Marigny, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil wurde um 1245 in Thiel-sur-Acolin, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mit Agnès de Traînel mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Marigny, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil è nato il circa 1245 nel Thiel-sur-Acolin, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agnès de Traînel. Morì nel Marigny, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.Marigny, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France: フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェマリグニー
ja.Thiel-sur-Acolin, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône: フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールスエル-スル-アコリン
ja.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thilは約1245年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールスエル-スル-アコリンで生まれた。彼はAgnès de Traînelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェマリグニーで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil(은)는 대략 1245년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 스이-수-악린에서 태어났다. 그는 Agnès de Traînel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 마익니에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Thiel-sur-Acolin, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Agnès de Traînel. Ele faleceu em Marigny, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil родился около 1245 г. в местности тиел-сур-аколинь, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Agnès de Traînel. Он умер в местности маригни, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Pons Poincet de Thil nació aproximadamente 1245, en Thiel-sur-Acolin, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Agnès de Traînel. Murió en Marigny, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
